name: query_weave_traces_tool
description: Query Weave traces, trace metadata, and trace costs with filtering and sorting options. Use for LLM traces, AI agent execution paths, chain-of-thought debugging, and LLM evaluation results. NOT for experiment runs or metrics.

entity_name.description: The W&B entity (username or team name)

sort_by.description: Field to sort by: started_at, total_cost, completion_cost, prompt_cost

limit.description: Maximum number of traces to return

truncate_length.description: Max character length for string values

name: count_weave_traces_tool
description: Count Weave traces and return the total storage size in bytes for the given filters. Only provides COUNT and STORAGE SIZE, not actual trace data. Use for Weave/LLM observability data, not W&B Models experiment data.

entity_name.description: The W&B entity (username or team name)

name: query_wandb_tool
description: Execute an arbitrary GraphQL query against the Weights & Biases Models API. Use for experiment runs, metrics, artifacts, model registry, sweeps, and reports. NOT for Weave traces.

max_items.description: Maximum total items to return across pages

name: create_wandb_report_tool
description: Create a new Weights & Biases Report to document analysis and findings. Only call if the user explicitly asks to create a report or save to W&B. Always return the report link to the user.

markdown_report_text.description: Markdown content for the report body

plots_html.description: Optional dict of plot HTML (kept for backwards compatibility, ignored)

name: query_wandb_entity_projects
description: Fetch all projects for a specific W&B entity. Use when the user hasn't specified a project name or queries are failing due to missing/incorrect project name. If no entity provided, fetches for current user and their teams.

entity.description: The W&B entity (username or team name). Optional — if omitted, returns projects for the current user and their teams.

name: query_wandb_support_bot
description: Query the Weights & Biases support bot (wandbot) for help with W&B platform questions. Covers experiment tracking, runs, sweeps, artifacts, registry, reports, tables, charts, Weave tracing, and Weave Evaluations.

question.description: User's question about a Weights & Biases product or feature
